items.title: Jito’s crash wipes out gains – 13.27% drop raises JTO’s correction fears
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's significant drop raises concerns about the stability of JTO and could impact investor confidence in Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: Solana, Sui and Aptos wallet data targeted in TrapDoor package attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The TrapDoor package attack targeting Solana wallets highlights vulnerabilities in the network, potentially affecting user trust and liquidity.

items.title: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The 30% drop in Solana's open interest signals reduced market activity, which could lead to further price declines and affect SOL's positioning.
